EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user tried to download the file "{object.name}" that matches the rule "{datafield2}" from an FTP resource on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} tried to upload the file "{object.name}" that matches the rule "{datafield2}" to an FTP resource on host {event_src.host}
The user tried to upload the file "{object.name}" that matches the rule "{datafield2}" to an FTP resource on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} tried to download the file "{object.name}" that matches the rule "{datafield2}" from an FTP resource on host {event_src.host}
